title: 시장 하락 및 지정학적 리스크
content: Global markets down due to Iran conflict, inflation, Fed higher-for-longer signal.

title: 아트 마켓 전시 소식
content: Frida and Diego at MoMA, Monet and Venice at de Young, New Humans at New Museum.

briefing: Geopolitical tension remains high with oil prices hitting $125. Equity markets are struggling to maintain gains. Art market continues to favor 'blue-chip' or provenance-heavy works as a hedge against inflation and instability.

Geopolitical tension remains high with oil prices hitting $125. Equity markets are struggling to maintain gains. AMZN shows positive sentiment around AWS and AI, though with capex concerns. INTC is showing mixed signals with institutional selling but optimism around the new Core Ultra Series 3 chips and 18A process.

Global markets are fluctuating due to geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. Stock futures are rallying on potential Iran de-escalation news. Art market shows a moderate 4% growth for 2025, with strong performance in the high-end U.S. segment.

summary: End-of-month market review: Defensive stock posture and strong blue-chip art demand.

briefing: Stock futures are rallying on news of a potential 4-6 week timeline to end the Iran military campaign. Art market data confirms a 23% rebound in 2025, with strong demand for blue-chip works. Christie's announces exhibition of Lalanne sculpture.
End-of-month market update: Amazon's AI focus maintains stability while Intel shows some resilience from new chip updates. Art market continues to demonstrate strength in the blue-chip segment.
Market closing summary: U.S. markets closed on a mixed but optimistic note regarding Middle East de-escalation; tech leaders hold steady, art market continues its blue-chip trajectory into Q2 2026.
U.S. markets mixed with defensive rotation; gold recovers to $4,565/oz as a safe-haven. Art market maintains blue-chip strength with a focus on provenance as an inflation hedge.
Market evening update: Volatility in Treasuries and continued tech accumulation. Art market maintains focus on blue-chip works with Q2 auction preparations underway.
Market consolidation following the end of March. Investors monitoring yield movements; art market remains focused on provenance-heavy assets for Q2.
Market consolidation continues with focus on Q2 positioning. Art market maintains focus on blue-chip and provenance-heavy assets.
End-of-month market consolidation continues with focus on Q2 positioning. Art market maintains focus on blue-chip and provenance-heavy assets for upcoming Q2 auctions.
